Localization.Description: Suspicious process start chain for PaperCut NG/MF application. This may indicate exploitation of the CVE-2023-27350 vulnerability and malicious code execution using the built-in PaperCut NG/MF functionality: printing scripts and integration with third-party tools for authorization

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Suspicious process start chain {alert.context} for the PaperCut NG/MF application on host {event_src.host}. Possible exploitation of vulnerability {detect}.
